profile.displayNameDescription: This is the name that will be displayed throughout the application.
profile.displayNameTooLong: Display name must be 100 characters or less
profile.displayNameUpdateFailed: Failed to update display name. Please try again.
profile.changePasswordDescription: Update your password to keep your account secure. Password must be at least 12 characters.
profile.newPasswordTooShort: New password must be at least 12 characters
profile.passwordChangeFailed: Failed to change password. Please try again.
profile.passwordManagedByProvider: Your credentials are managed by your identity provider.

dav.heading: DAV Access (Calendar & Contacts)
dav.description: Connect your calendar and contacts app using CalDAV and CardDAV. Generate a token to authenticate your device.
dav.revokeConfirm: Are you sure you want to revoke the DAV token? Connected apps will stop syncing.
dav.tokenWarning: Copy this token now — it will not be shown again.
